title: Lantern-shader
description: A lightweight shader pack with beautiful lighting and pixelated shadows.
body:
# LanternShader  
A lightweight shader pack~  

---
#### About:  
This is a shader pack featuring beautiful color palettes and pixelated shadows.  
It is lightweight enough to have minimal performance impact, allowing it to run smoothly even on some integrated graphics cards.

![Forest in the sun](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1cdf7a5283134c823588133854a79606018f70a0.jpeg)
